message:
fix: resolve pre-existing test failures in fcp-store and fcp-raptorq

fcp-store repair tests:
- planner_reason_codes_cover_policy_diversity_and_hot_paths: hot_object
  was unavailable (19 < 20 source symbols) so plan_reason_code returned
  PolicySloDeficit instead of HotObjectPreStage. Fix: make hot_object
  available (10/10 symbols) and set hot_object_min_coverage_bps=15000
  so the hot-object check triggers correctly.
- repair_planner_cycle_improves_zone_slo: max_symbols_per_repair=4 was
  too low to bring any object from ~50% to 100% coverage. Fix: increase
  to 8 so repaired objects can actually reach their target.

fcp-raptorq:
- decode_with_context_deadline_timeout: decode completed all 256 symbols
  before the zero-duration timeout could fire, returning
  InsufficientSymbols instead of Timeout. Fix: add explicit expired-
  deadline check at the start of decode_with_context.
- bounded_excess_symbols_no_panic: high ESIs are correctly rejected by
  the decoder; the test should verify no panic, not require success.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
